tools.name: check_agent_trust
tools.description: Know Your Agent (KYA): score how trustworthy an AI agent or wallet is before paying or transacting with it. Returns a trust score 0-100, tier (Open/Verified/Trusted/Enterprise) and components (ERC-8004 identity, sanctions screening, wallet age/activity). Input: an Ethereum address. Free, read-only.

tools.name: settlement_estimate
tools.description: Estimate converting a USDC amount to EUR via AsterPay's EUR off-ramp. Returns the exchange rate, AsterPay fee (0.5% + €0.10 on the EU rail), net EUR amount and SEPA Instant timing. Input: a USDC amount. Free, read-only — no payment is made.

tools.name: market_rates
tools.description: Get current reference market rates used by AsterPay (e.g. USDC, EURC, major crypto rates and FX). No input. Free, read-only.

tools.name: merchant_resolve
tools.description: Resolve a European business to its verified payment endpoint (IBAN/BIC) via AsterPay's Merchant Payment Endpoint (MPE), from provable sources only. Provide EITHER a merchant_id OR a business_id together with its business_id_type (vat, y_tunnus, company_number, lei, duns). Tip: business_id_type 'demo
